I placed an order for three items, but I ended up receiving two of them instead. I thought maybe it was just a mistake, but I double-checked my order details, and it clearly states that all three should have been sent. Can you please issue a refund for the missing item? However, if it turns out that one of my items is actually on backorder, I would be okay with waiting a bit longer for it instead of getting a refund. I just really want to know what happened!
